regex.target: description:"它将删除您的所有配置"

regex.target: description:"此账户设置用于管理通过包管理器购买的已购项目"

regex.source: description:"The maximum number of tokens to generate in the chat completion. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length. (1000 tokens ~ 750 words)"
regex.target: description:"聊天补全中允许生成的最大 token 数。输入 token 与生成 token 的总长度不得超过模型的上下文长度限制（1000个标记约对应750个英文单词）。"

regex.source: description:"What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic."
regex.target: description:"采样温度参数，取值范围为 0 至 2 。较高值（如 0.8）会增强输出的随机性，而较低值（如 0.2 ）则会使输出更加集中且具有确定性。"

regex.source: description:"Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics."
regex.target: description:"取值范围为 -2.0 到 2.0 。正值会根据新 token 是否已出现在当前文本中对其进行惩罚，从而提高模型讨论新话题的可能性。"

regex.source: description:"Timeout in milliseconds. If the request takes longer than the timeout, the request will be aborted. (default: 5000ms)"
regex.target: description:"超时时间（毫秒）。若请求耗时超过设定阈值，将强制中止请求（默认值：5000毫秒）"

regex.source: description:"Prefix to add to the beginning of the completion (default: '\\n\\n')"
regex.target: description:"在生成内容开头添加的前缀（默认值：'\\n\\n'）"

regex.source: description:"enable this only if you get blocked by CORS, in mobile this will result in failure in some functions"
regex.target: description:"仅在因跨域资源共享（CORS）被阻止时启用此选项，在移动端启用可能会导致部分功能失效"

regex.target: description:"输入用于生成自动建议的停止短语。当找到停止短语时，生成将停止。（单词用空格，句子用句号，段落用换行符。）"
